modals.reallocateEstimateMessage: "{{child}}" increased by {{delta}}. Reduce "{{parent}}"'s estimate by {{delta}} to keep the same total?
modals.taskCreatorDiscardMessage: Your unsaved changes will be discarded.
modals.plainCheckboxEditorDiscardMessage: Your unsaved checkbox edits will be discarded.
modals.convertCurrentNoteMessage: Convert the current markdown note into an Operon file task?
modals.convertFileTaskToInlineTitle: Convert File Task to Inline Task
modals.convertFileTaskToInlineMessage: This will convert the selected file task into a single inline task. Only canonical Operon data is preserved: description, checkbox state, tags, and canonical fields. File body content, comments, custom or non-canonical frontmatter, and other markdown content are not moved into the inline task. After the inline task is created, the source file is moved to Obsidian trash.
modals.taskFinderProjectTasksTooltip: Choose a parent task, then search that parent and its direct children.
modals.taskFinderProjectTreeTooltip: Choose a parent task, then search that parent and all descendants.
modals.taskFinderOverdueTooltip: Show tasks whose scheduled date or due date is in the past.
modals.taskFinderHappensTodayTooltip: Show open tasks whose due, scheduled, or started date is today.
modals.taskFinderRecentModifiedTooltip: Show tasks modified in the {{period}}, newest first.
modals.taskFinderScopeUnavailable: This search scope is not available in this view yet.
modals.taskFinderIncludeInlineTooltipActive: Inline tasks are included in the current Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeInlineTooltipInactive: Add inline tasks to the Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeFileTooltipActive: File tasks are included in the current Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeFileTooltipInactive: Add file tasks to the Task Finder scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeCancelledTooltip: Add cancelled tasks to the search scope.
modals.taskFinderIncludeFinishedTooltip: Add finished tasks to the search scope.

notifications.projectedRecurringShiftLimit: Projected recurring task dates can only move inside the open window between neighboring recurrence slots.
notifications.followingRecurringShiftLimit: This and following tasks can only move inside the open window between neighboring recurrence slots.
notifications.recurringDateMoveWindowLimit: Recurring task dates can only move inside the open window between the previous and next recurrence slots.
notifications.dailyRecurringDateMoveLimit: Daily recurring tasks cannot move to another date. Change only the time or skip this occurrence.

notifications.calendarTrackedSessionStale: That tracked session changed elsewhere. Calendar refreshed.

notifications.externalCalendarSyncSkipped: External calendar sync needs a valid URL.
notifications.externalCalendarsSyncComplete: External calendars updated. Synced: {{synced}}, failed: {{failed}}, skipped: {{skipped}}.
notifications.calendarFilterMismatch: This task does not match the current calendar filter. Opening the task editor.
notifications.kanbanFilterMismatch: This task does not match the current kanban filter. Opening the task editor.
notifications.calendarCreatedTaskFilterMismatch: Created task does not match the current calendar filter.
notifications.kanbanCreatedTaskFilterMismatch: Created task does not match the current kanban filter.
notifications.creatorPostCreateFinalizeFailed: Task was created, but follow-up setup failed.
notifications.singleCursorOrSelectionRequired: Use a single cursor or selection.

notifications.inlineReplacementRollbackFailed: Inline replacement failed after creating {{path}}. Duplicate operonId may remain.

notifications.selectedFileTaskUnavailable: The selected file task is no longer available.
notifications.sameFileInlineTarget: Cannot convert this file task because the inline task target resolves to the same file.

notifications.fileTaskConvertedToInlineTask: File task converted to inline task: {{taskName}}
notifications.inlineInsertFailed: Failed to insert the inline task into the configured target file.

duplicateOperonId.title: Operon ID Conflict
duplicateOperonId.intro: Resolve duplicate operonId conflicts here. You can close this window anytime and reopen it from the command palette or status bar alert.
duplicateOperonId.statusBarConflictLabel: {{count}} duplicate task copies detected. Open duplicate manager.

settings.title: Operon Settings
settings.settingsPageCoreGeneralDesc: Language, time format, demo workspace, indexing, and duplicate alerts.
settings.settingsPageInlineTasksDesc: Defaults for creating inline tasks, parent placement, and Live Preview conversion actions.
settings.settingsPageFileTasksDesc: File task folders, templates, archiving, Daily Notes integration, and note conversion.
settings.settingsPageRelationshipsDesc: Automatic parent links, inheritance, and project serials for task hierarchies.
settings.settingsPageRecurrenceDesc: Recurring task placement, file occurrence destinations, and recurring YAML cleanup.
settings.settingsPageTrackerDesc: Time tracking history, status bar timer, FlowTime behavior, and session splitting.
settings.settingsPageTaskChipsDesc: Task Creator toolbar buttons plus compact task chips for inline tasks, Filter View results, Kanban cards, Task Finder, and Task Wikilink Overlays.
settings.settingsPagePinnedDockDesc: Pinned task dock/sidebar behavior, layout, auto-pin rules, and mobile availability.
settings.settingsPageTaskFinderDesc: Task Finder launch behavior, visible results, remembered scopes, shortcuts, and result chips.
settings.settingsPageContextMenuDesc: Calendar hover and contextual menu actions, delays, and surface visibility.
settings.settingsPageStateIconsDesc: Fallback task icons and the color source for the main status-cycle task icon.
settings.settingsPageTaskEditorDesc: Task Editor picker rows, order, and visibility.
settings.settingsPageLocationMapDesc: Location chip picker map defaults and map preview size.
settings.settingsPageTweaksDesc: Optional workspace-level visual helpers for scrollbars, Properties, and side dock tab icons.
settings.settingsPageColorPaletteDesc: Customize the 28 named colors used by Operon color pickers.
settings.colorPaletteSectionDesc: Edit the fixed 28 named color slots used by Operon color picker search and presets.
settings.colorPaletteInvalidHex: Use a valid RRGGBB hex value.
settings.colorPaletteResetMessage: This will restore all 28 named colors to the Operon defaults.
settings.settingsPageMobileTaskEditorDesc: Phone Task Editor toolbar tools, order, and visibility.
settings.settingsPageMobileCalendarDesc: Phone-first Calendar layout, agenda windows, visible items, and mobile event display.
settings.settingsPageMobileKanbanDesc: Touch-first Kanban layout, horizontal snapping, and compact swimlane behavior.
settings.languageDesc: UI language. "Auto" uses your Obsidian locale setting.
settings.releaseNotesCardDesc: Catch up on recent improvements, fixes, and smoother workflows
settings.supportDevelopmentCardDesc: If Operon earns a place in your daily workflow, a coffee keeps me building. ☕
settings.releaseNotesShowOnUpdateDesc: Open the latest Operon release notes automatically after plugin updates.
settings.operonDocsSectionDesc: Download the official Operon docs into Operon/Docs as a vault wiki.
settings.operonDocsDownloadNowDesc: Downloads official docs into Operon/Docs. Managed DOCS-*.md files may be overwritten; copy them elsewhere before editing.
settings.operonDocsAutoUpdateEnabledDesc: Refreshes official docs in Operon/Docs after Operon updates. Only managed DOCS-*.md files are overwritten.
settings.mobileInterfaceDesc: Tune phone and touch-first interface behavior without changing desktop layouts.
settings.mobileGlobalTaskFabEnabledDesc: Show a floating plus button on phones for opening Task Creator across mobile surfaces.
settings.mobileGlobalTaskFabHideInCalendar: Hide mobile create button in Calendar
settings.mobileGlobalTaskFabHideInCalendarDesc: Hide the floating create button while a Calendar view is active on phones.
settings.mobileGlobalTaskFabHideInKanban: Hide mobile create button in Kanban
settings.mobileGlobalTaskFabHideInKanbanDesc: Hide the floating create button while a Kanban view is active on phones.
settings.contextualMenuMobileAutoHideDesc: How long a mobile contextual menu stays visible after opening before it closes automatically.
settings.mobileGlobalTaskFabResetPositionDesc: Move the mobile quick-create button back to the default bottom-right position.
settings.calendarMobileEnabledDesc: Use the compact phone-first Calendar surface in narrow calendar panes.
settings.calendarMobileMaxWidthDesc: Calendar panes at or below this width use the mobile Calendar surface.
settings.calendarMobileDefaultViewDesc: Choose the view used when a mobile Calendar leaf has no remembered view yet.
settings.calendarMobileDefaultSourcePresetDesc: Choose which desktop Calendar preset supplies filters, colors, and external calendar visibility when mobile has no remembered source preset.
settings.calendarMobileViewCycleDesc: Choose which mobile Calendar views appear when cycling from the toolbar.
settings.calendarMobileAgendaEnabledDesc: Include Agenda in the mobile Calendar view cycle.
settings.calendarMobileDayEnabledDesc: Include Day in the mobile Calendar view cycle.
settings.calendarMobileTwoDayEnabledDesc: Include 2 Days in the mobile Calendar view cycle.
settings.calendarMobileThreeDayEnabledDesc: Include 3 Days in the mobile Calendar view cycle.
settings.calendarMobileViewPresetsDesc: Choose the Calendar preset used by each mobile Calendar view mode.
settings.calendarMobileAgendaSourcePresetDesc: Choose the Calendar preset used by mobile Agenda.
settings.calendarMobileDaySourcePresetDesc: Choose the Calendar preset used by mobile Day.
settings.calendarMobileTwoDaySourcePresetDesc: Choose the Calendar preset used by mobile 2 Days.
settings.calendarMobileThreeDaySourcePresetDesc: Choose the Calendar preset used by mobile 3 Days.
settings.calendarMobileSlotMinutesDesc: Choose the time grouping used by the compact mobile Day, 2 Days, and 3 Days views.
settings.calendarMobileShowProjectedOccurrencesDe: Show future recurring-task projections in the mobile Calendar without changing desktop presets.
settings.calendarMobileShowExternalCalendarsDesc: Show source-preset external calendars in the mobile Calendar without changing desktop presets.
settings.calendarMobileColorSourceDesc: Choose which color source the mobile Calendar uses for task blocks.
settings.calendarMobileShowDueMarkersDesc: Show due-date markers in the mobile Calendar.
settings.calendarMobileShowAllDayItemsDesc: Show scheduled all-day items in the mobile Calendar.
settings.calendarMobileAgendaPastDaysDesc: Choose how many days before the selected date mobile Agenda shows.
settings.calendarMobileAgendaFutureDaysDesc: Choose how many days after the selected date mobile Agenda shows.
settings.calendarMobileAgendaShowCompletedItemsDe: Show completed and cancelled tasks in the mobile Agenda.
settings.calendarMobileAllDayVisibleTaskLimitDesc: Choose how many task rows the mobile Day, 2 Days, and 3 Days all-day rail shows before scrolling.
settings.calendarMobileShowCompletedItems: Mobile Day/2 Days/3 Days completed items
settings.calendarMobileShowCompletedItemsDesc: Show completed and cancelled tasks in the mobile Day, 2 Days, and 3 Days views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc: Map Operon task fields to visible property names in file-task YAML/frontmatter and inline task metadata while keeping canonical keys stable.
settings.customKeysDesc: Create and manage custom canonical fields, surface visibility, usage, order, and delete behavior.
settings.indexDebounceDesc: Milliseconds Operon waits before processing file changes and incremental index updates during vault scans.
settings.fullReindexOnStartupDesc: Always run a full vault scan and rebuild the task index when Operon loads.
settings.duplicateAlertAutoOpenManagerDesc: Open the duplicate operonId manager automatically after the alert delay if conflicts still exist.
settings.duplicateAlertDelayDesc: How long Operon waits before showing duplicate notices, status bar alerts, and the optional manager popup.
settings.taskBarChipsDesc: Choose which field chips appear on task bars.
settings.subtasksDefaultExpandedDesc: Show subtask lists expanded when task bar loads.
settings.timeFormatDesc: Choose how clock times are displayed across Operon.
settings.demoWorkspaceDesc: Create or repair the Operon Basics Project, command reference note, setup project, and bundled filters without overwriting your edits.
settings.demoWorkspacePromptMessage: Operon can add a small demo workspace with real tasks, a command reference note, a setup project, and ready-made filters, so you can explore the main workflows safely.
settings.childTaskInheritanceStatusPipelineSource: Used when Status is included in parent-child inheritance. New child tasks start at the first status of the selected pipeline.
settings.parentChildTaskInheritanceDesc: Choose which parent task fields are copied into a new child task during creation. The parent link is always added separately; this list only controls inherited metadata. If Status is included, the Status pipeline setting above decides which pipeline supplies the starting status.
settings.parentChildTaskInheritanceEmpty: No fields are inherited from parent tasks.
settings.projectSerialsDesc: Define read-only visual serials for a parent task tree. The real operonId is unchanged. Prefixes use 1-5 ASCII letters and keep your casing; the dash is automatic. Letters plus numbers always total 7 characters, excluding the dash. Nested serials win over parent serials, and generated numbers are automatic, persistent, and not manually editable.
settings.projectSerialIndexerUnavailable: Project serials need the task index to be ready.
settings.projectSerialInvalidPrefix: Use 1-5 ASCII letters for the serial prefix.
settings.projectSerialParentNotFound: No task found with that starting parent task ID.
settings.projectSerialDuplicateParent: That starting parent task already has a project serial.
settings.projectSerialRenameDuplicatePrefixConfir: {{count}} existing serial already uses this prefix. Stored task-number assignments will stay unchanged; only the visible prefix will change.
settings.projectSerialOverlapConfirm: {{count}} existing serial overlaps this task tree.
settings.projectSerialNestedRemainConfirm: {{count}} nested tasks will remain under another serial.
settings.projectSerialDeleteAssignmentsConfirm: Stored number assignments for this serial will be removed.
settings.inlineTaskDefaultSavePathDesc: Choose where New Operon Task writes inline tasks by default.
settings.inlineTaskUseDailyNote: Save new inline tasks to today's daily note
settings.inlineTaskUseDailyNoteDesc: When enabled, the New Operon Task flow writes inline tasks to the current daily note.
settings.inlineTaskTargetFileDesc: Markdown file used when the default save path is Specific File. New tasks are grouped under ## [[YYYY-MM-DD]].
settings.inlineTaskHeadingDesc: Daily Notes, Active File, and Ask Every Time heading keyword. First heading containing this phrase receives new inline tasks. If none exists, Operon creates a ## heading. Specific File mode uses automatic ## [[YYYY-MM-DD]] headings instead.
settings.inlineParentTaskTargetMode: Inline task placement when parent is inline
settings.inlineParentTaskTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task writes inline tasks when the selected parent is an inline task.
settings.fileParentTaskTargetMode: Inline task placement when parent is file task
settings.fileParentTaskTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task writes inline tasks when the selected parent is a file task.
settings.parentFileHeadingKeywordDesc: First heading containing this phrase receives new inline tasks. If none exists, Operon creates a ## heading at the end of the parent file.
settings.inlineTaskDailyNoteAddStartDate: Add Start Date from Daily Note date
settings.inlineTaskDailyNoteAddStartDateDesc: For new Operon inline tasks created in Daily Notes, fill Start Date from the note date when the task does not already have one.
settings.inlineTaskDailyNoteAddScheduledDate: Add Scheduled Date from Daily Note date
settings.inlineTaskDailyNoteAddScheduledDateDesc: For new Operon inline tasks created in Daily Notes, fill Scheduled Date from the note date when the task does not already have one.
settings.autoParentInlineSubtasksDesc: When creating an inline task inside a file task, automatically set its parent to that file task.
settings.autoParentLinkedFileSubtasksDesc: When creating a linked file task inside a file task, automatically set its parent to that file task.
settings.fileTasksFolderDesc: Default folder for new file tasks. Default is Operon/Tasks; leave empty for vault root.
settings.fileTaskInlineParentTargetMode: File task placement when parent is inline
settings.fileTaskInlineParentTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task creates file tasks when the selected parent is an inline task.
settings.fileTaskFileParentTargetMode: File task placement when parent is file task
settings.fileTaskFileParentTargetModeDesc: Choose where New Operon Task creates file tasks when the selected parent is a file task.
settings.inlineToFileTaskMovePlainCheckboxes: Move checkboxes when converting inline tasks
settings.inlineToFileTaskMovePlainCheckboxesDesc: When an inline task is converted to a file task, move the plain checkboxes scoped to that task into the top of the new file task note.
settings.showTasksEmojiConvertIcon: Show Tasks-to-Operon icon on classic task lines
settings.showTasksEmojiConvertIconDesc: Live Preview only. Shows a circle-plus icon on hover for Tasks emoji lines that can be converted to Operon.
settings.showPlainCheckboxConvertIcon: Show checkbox-to-Operon icon on classic task lines
settings.showPlainCheckboxConvertIconDesc: Live Preview only. Shows a square-plus icon on hover for plain checkbox lines that can be upgraded to Operon.
settings.fallbackTaskIconSourceDesc: Choose which source Operon checks when a task has no taskIcon. If that source has no matching icon, the Open, Finished, or Cancelled state icon is used.
settings.taskStatusIconColorSourceDesc: Choose how Operon colors the main task icon used to cycle status. Task and priority colors fall back to no color when missing.
settings.fallbackOpenStateIconDesc: Used when a task has no taskIcon and its state is open across Live Preview and compact task rows.
settings.fallbackFinishedStateIconDesc: Used when a task has no taskIcon and its state is finished across Live Preview and compact task rows.
settings.fallbackCancelledStateIconDesc: Used when a task has no taskIcon and its state is cancelled across Live Preview and compact task rows.
settings.taskCreatorToolbarSectionDesc: New Operon Creator Toolbar controls which toolbar icons are visible in New Operon Task and their order. This changes only the visual toolbar, not task creation functionality.
settings.taskCreatorToolbarNoVisible: No toolbar icons are currently visible.
settings.taskEditorShowLineNumbers: Show line numbers in Task Editor
settings.taskEditorShowLineNumbersDesc: Display source line numbers in the Task Editor file body panel.
settings.taskEditorAutosaveDelayDesc: Choose how long Operon waits after your last edit before autosaving. Closing the editor still saves immediately.
settings.workspaceTweaksHideScrollbarsDesc: Hide scrollbars across the Obsidian workspace while keeping normal scrolling behavior.
settings.workspaceTweaksCompactSidebarTabIconsDes: Slim side dock tab icon/header strips and reveal the full tab area on hover.
settings.workspaceTweaksCollapsePropertiesDesc: Collapse Obsidian Properties when matching notes open; use the scope and excluded folders below to control where it applies.
settings.workspaceTweaksPropertiesScopeDesc: Choose whether Properties collapse only for Operon file tasks or for every note.
settings.workspaceTweaksPropertiesExcludedFolders: Notes in these folders always keep Properties open, even when the Properties tweak is enabled.
settings.taskEditorWorkflowPickersDesc: Choose which picker rows appear in the Task Editor, then adjust their order. Hidden pickers do not change existing task metadata.
settings.locationPlaceVisualPropertiesSectionDesc: Optional property names for place-note icons and colors. Leave them empty when they match the Operon task icon and task color key mappings.
settings.locationPlaceIconPropertyNameDesc: Optional place-note property used for Location marker and chip icons. Leave empty when it matches the task icon key mapping.
settings.locationPlaceColorPropertyNameDesc: Optional place-note property used for Location marker and chip colors. Leave empty when it matches the task color key mapping.
settings.locationMapsAlwaysLightModeDesc: Use the light map tile style for Location picker and preview maps even when Obsidian is in dark mode.
settings.locationPickerMapDefaultCenterDesc: Optional center coordinate for the Map picker tab, using lat, lng format.
settings.locationPickerMapDefaultZoomDesc: Initial zoom level used by the Map picker tab.
settings.locationPreviewWidthDesc: Width of the location chip map preview in pixels.
settings.locationPreviewHeightDesc: Height of the location chip map preview in pixels.
settings.locationPreviewDefaultZoomDesc: Initial zoom level used when a location chip opens its map preview.
settings.locationPreviewMinZoomDesc: Lowest zoom level allowed inside the location chip map preview.
settings.locationPreviewMaxZoomDesc: Highest zoom level allowed inside the location chip map preview.
settings.taskEditorMobileCoreToolsDesc: Mobile Task Editor Toolbar controls which core icons appear on phones and adjusts their order. Go to Source stays first and Remove stays last when visible.
settings.pinnedTasksDesktopSurfaceDesc: Choose how pinned tasks open on desktop.
settings.pinnedTasksMobileSidebarNoteDesc: On mobile, pinned tasks always open as a sidebar list, no matter which desktop display is selected.
settings.pinnedTasksSidebarSideDesc: Choose where the pinned tasks sidebar opens when no pinned sidebar is already open.
settings.pinnedDockAutoCloseDesc: Collapse the pinned dock back to the pin icon after the mouse leaves it. Turn this off to keep the dock always open.
settings.pinnedDockAutoCloseDelayDesc: Seconds to wait after the mouse leaves the dock before collapsing it.
settings.pinnedDockTaskCardWidthDesc: Width of pinned task cards in horizontal layout (120-800).
settings.pinnedDockTaskColorSourceDesc: Choose which task color system pinned task cards should follow.
settings.pinnedDockDisableOnMobileDesc: Hide and disable the pinned dock on phones while keeping it available on desktop and tablet.
settings.pinnedDockLayoutDesc: How pinned task cards are arranged in the dock.
settings.pinnedDockGridColumnsDesc: Number of columns when layout is set to Grid.
settings.pinnedDockAutoPinActiveTimerTaskDesc: Pin a task automatically when its timer starts. The pin remains when the timer stops.
settings.pinnedDockAutoUnpinFinishedTasksDesc: Automatically unpin a task when it reaches a finished or cancelled state.
settings.inlineTaskIconsSectionDesc: Inline Task Chips controls which compact inline task chips are visible in Live Preview conceal mode and reading view, then adjusts their order. This affects only the compact chip row.
settings.filterTaskIconsSectionDesc: Filter Task Chips controls which compact task chips are visible in Filter View and embedded filter results, then adjusts their order. This affects only filter surfaces.
settings.kanbanTaskIconsSectionDesc: Kanban Task Chips prepares which compact task chips Kanban cards will use and their order. Project Serial appears separately when available.
settings.kanbanTaskPlayActionDesc: Show the timer action chip on Kanban cards when the task can be timed.
settings.kanbanTaskPinActionDesc: Show the pin action chip on Kanban cards.
settings.kanbanTaskNoteActionDesc: Show the note indicator chip on Kanban cards when the task has a note.
settings.kanbanTaskSubtaskActionDesc: Show the add subtask action chip on Kanban cards.
settings.kanbanTaskOpenCheckboxActionDesc: Show the normal checkbox action chip on Kanban cards so task checkboxes can be opened or created from the card.
settings.filterTaskOpenCheckboxActionDesc: Show the normal checkbox chip in filter rows so file and inline task checkboxes can be opened from filters.
settings.taskWikilinkOverlayOpenCheckboxActionDes: Show the normal checkbox action in Task Wikilink Overlays so that task checkboxes can be opened or created from the overlay.
settings.filterShowSubtasksDesc: Expand parent tasks to show their subtasks across all filter views.
settings.filterShowOnlyOpenSubtasks: Show only open subtasks under parent task
settings.filterShowOnlyOpenSubtasksDesc: When enabled, only open subtasks stay visible under each parent task across all filter views.
settings.dynamicFileTaskFilterEnabledDesc: Show the automatic filter in Reading View and Live Preview for YAML file tasks. It targets the current file task by operonId.
settings.dynamicFileTaskFilterPlacementDesc: Choose whether the automatic filter appears at the top or bottom of the file body.
settings.dynamicFileTaskFilterSubtaskAutoExpandLi: Automatically expand the visible subtask tree when it is at or below the selected limit.
settings.dynamicFileTaskFilterShowOnlyOpenSubtask: When enabled, only open subtasks stay visible under the file task row.
settings.dynamicSubtasksFilterSubtaskAutoExpandLi: Automatically expand the contextual subtask tree when it is at or below the selected limit.
settings.dynamicSubtasksFilterShowOnlyOpenSubtask: When enabled, only open subtasks stay visible in the contextual subtask window.
settings.taskFinderShowRecentModifiedOnOpen: Show recently modified tasks when Task Finder opens.
settings.taskFinderShowRecentModifiedOnOpenDesc: When enabled, Task Finder opens with the 'Recently Modified' button selected.
settings.taskFinderRecentModifiedDaysDesc: How many days the 'Recently Modified' button considers when listing updated tasks.
settings.taskFinderVisibleResultCountDesc: How many Task Finder result rows stay visible before the list scrolls.
settings.taskFinderRememberLastScopesDesc: Reopen Task Finder with the last selected scope buttons and project selection. Turn off to start with Inline Tasks and File Tasks only.
settings.taskFinderShortcutsDesc: Configure dot shortcuts that switch Task Finder scopes. Type a shortcut in Task Finder search, such as .1 or .project, to toggle the matching scope button.
settings.taskFinderShortcutInputDesc: Stored without the dot. Current hotkey: {{command}}
settings.taskFinderShortcutInvalid: Task Finder shortcuts must be 1-3 lowercase letters or numbers, without dots, colons, or spaces.
settings.taskFinderIconsSectionDesc: Task Finder Chips controls which compact chips appear in Task Finder results and their order. Chips are visual only and do not use the chip display-mode toggle.
settings.taskWikilinkOverlayIconsSectionDesc: Task Wikilink Overlay Chips controls which compact chips are visible in Task Wikilink Overlay mode and their order. Chips appear after the progress bar and before the edit action.
settings.inlineRepeatPlacementDesc: Choose whether the next inline occurrence is inserted above or below the completed task.
settings.fileRepeatDestinationDesc: Choose where new recurring file task occurrences are created.
settings.fileRepeatCustomFolderDesc: Folder used when 'Custom folder' is selected as the file occurrence destination.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalDesc: Applies only to recurring file tasks. Enter raw YAML property names exactly as they appear in the file, separated by commas. Matching values will be cleared in newly created files.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalPropertiesDesc: Separate raw YAML property names with commas.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalDeleteMessage: This only removes the cleanup rule. Existing recurring task files are not changed.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalNoSeries: No eligible recurring file task series available.
settings.repeatYamlPropertyRemovalMissingSeries: This repeat series no longer exists. Remove the rule when you no longer need it.
settings.keyMappingsIntro: Each Operon task field has an internal canonical key and a visible property name. The visible name is used in file-task YAML, inline task metadata, and task UI surfaces. Renaming the visible property changes how the field appears without changing the canonical key used by views, automation, and migrations.
settings.keyMappingsLegendPropertyDesc: Property name used in file-task YAML and inline task metadata (editable)
settings.keyMappingsLegendValueSharingDesc: Values used in file-task YAML are shared with matching inline task fields, so they can appear as suggestions while editing inline tasks, or the other way around.
settings.keyMappingsLegendHideDesc: Hide this field from the rendered metadata section shown in file tasks and inline metadata. The value is still saved and usable by Operon.
settings.keyMappingsLegendTypeDesc: Data type used for this field in file-task YAML, inline task metadata, and Operon views, such as text, number, date, checkbox, or list. This helps Operon choose the right editor, validation, and display format.
settings.keyMappingsAddCustomFieldDesc: Create a new managed canonical key for inline task metadata, file-task YAML, and Operon task surfaces.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldCanonicalDesc: Used inside inline task metadata. It cannot be changed after creation.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldTypeDesc: Controls the standard picker, YAML value shape, validation, and display format.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldPropertyDesc: Visible property name used in file-task YAML and task UI. Leave blank to use the canonical key.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldIconDesc: Choose the icon used in field controls and compact chips.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldDescriptionDesc: Optional helper text shown in the Keymapping list.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldDescriptionPlaceho: What this field is used for
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldCanonicalInvalid: Canonical key must start with a letter and use only letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldCanonicalReserved: This canonical key is reserved by Operon.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldTypeInvalid: Choose a supported custom field type.
settings.keyMappingsCustomFieldPropertyDuplicate: This visible property name is already in use.
settings.keyMappingsDeleteCustomFieldMessage: This removes only the custom field mapping from Operon settings. Existing inline metadata tokens and YAML properties stay in your files and become unmanaged until you recreate the same canonical key.
settings.keyMappingsNoCustom: No custom keys defined. Use the button below to add one.
settings.keyMappingsHideTooltip: Keeps the property in YAML and hides it only from the rendered file-task metadata view.
settings.keyMappingsHideAria: Hide in rendered file-task metadata view
settings.keyMappingsShowInEditorTooltip: Show this custom field in Task Editor controls and Live Preview field menus.
settings.keyMappingsShowInCreatorTooltip: Show this custom field in Task Creator toolbar and field suggestions.
settings.keyMappingsShowInChipsTooltip: Show this custom field in compact task chips.
settings.keyMappingsShowInKanbanSwimlaneTooltip: Offer this custom field as a Kanban swimlane grouping option.
settings.keyMappingsSurfaceCheckboxUnsupported: Checkbox custom fields are stored but not shown in editor, creator, chip, or Kanban swimlane surfaces yet.
settings.keyMappingsIconPlaceholder: Search Lucide icon or leave blank
settings.keyMappingsIconPickerTooltip: Choose an icon for this canonical key. Leave blank to keep it unset.
settings.keyMappingsCustomCanonicalFormat: Key must be alphanumeric, starting with a letter.
settings.keyMappingsCustomDescriptionFallback: Custom property available in file-task YAML and Operon views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_operonId: Internal unique task ID used to keep the file task linked to Operon systems.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_status: Workflow state used by pipelines, filters, and task actions.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_priority: Priority value used for sorting, views, and planning decisions.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateDue: Due date used to show deadlines and due markers.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateScheduled: Planned date used for scheduling and calendar placement.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateStarted: Earliest date the task should begin.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeCreated: Creation timestamp stored for the current task instance.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateCompleted: Completion date set when the task is marked done.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_dateCancelled: Cancellation date set when the task is marked cancelled.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeStart: Scheduled start datetime used by calendar and timing views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeEnd: Scheduled end datetime used by calendar and timing views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_estimate: Estimated work duration stored in seconds.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_duration: Tracked work duration stored in seconds.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_totalEstimate: Automatic estimate total including child tasks.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_totalDuration: Automatic tracked duration total including child tasks.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_repeat: Recurring rule that controls future task generation.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_repeatSeriesId: Internal recurring series ID used to group generated occurrences.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeRepeatEnd: End datetime that limits recurrence generation.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_parentTask: Parent task ID used to build task hierarchies.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_blocking: Tasks that depend on this task before they can continue.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_blockedBy: Tasks that must finish before this task can continue.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_assignees: People responsible for doing the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_contexts: Contexts or environments relevant to the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_progress: Completion percentage used in views and summaries.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_reminders: Reminder timestamps or offsets associated with the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_timezone: Timezone used to interpret scheduled datetime values.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_trackers: Completed tracking sessions stored as datetime ranges.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_activeTracker: Active timer start datetime while tracking is running.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_taskIcon: Icon name used in Operon task views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_taskColor: Color value used in Operon task views.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_note: Short note or annotation shown alongside the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_location: Location coordinates stored as latitude, longitude text and shown as a map chip.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_links: External web links associated with the task.
settings.keyMappingsDesc_datetimeModified: Automatic last-modified timestamp for the task.
settings.calendarHoverMenuActionsDesc: These actions appear on task-icon hover menus only when the current task data supports them. The visible menu can change by context.
settings.calendarHoverMenuOpenDelayDesc: Delay in milliseconds before a contextual hover menu opens.
settings.contextualMenuActionsDesc: Choose which contextual menu actions are globally enabled and adjust their order. Actions still appear only when the current task and surface support them.
settings.contextualMenuMobileEnabledDesc: Open task contextual menus with a mobile-first long-press interaction instead of relying on hover behavior on mobile platforms.
settings.contextualMenuMobileLongPressDesc: How long a touch or pen press must stay on a task trigger before the contextual menu opens on mobile platforms.
settings.contextualMenuMobileTransitionGraceDesc: How long the mobile contextual menu keeps its first transition protected so early outside touches and text selection do not close it immediately.
settings.contextualMenuOpenDelayDesc: Milliseconds to wait before a hover-based contextual menu opens.
settings.contextualMenuMatrixDesc: Choose where globally enabled contextual menu actions can appear. Task and surface rules still decide whether each action is available.
settings.contextualMenuMatrixLockedGlobal: First enable this action above to choose its surfaces.
settings.contextualMenuMatrixLockedSurface: This action is not supported on this surface.
settings.calendarHoverActionOpenEditorDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can open the task editor.
settings.contextualMenuActionOpenEditorDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can open the task editor.
settings.contextualMenuActionConvertInlineToFileT: Turn this inline task into a file task.
settings.contextualMenuActionConvertFileToInlineT: Turn this file task into an inline task.
settings.contextualMenuActionSubtasksDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can open its subtask tree.
settings.contextualMenuActionCreateSubtaskDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can create a subtask.
settings.contextualMenuActionCheckboxesDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can open or create plain checkboxes.
settings.calendarHoverActionTaskStatusDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can update the task status.
settings.contextualMenuActionTaskStatusDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can update the task status.
settings.calendarHoverActionPinToggleDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current task can be pinned or unpinned.
settings.contextualMenuActionPinToggleDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can be pinned or unpinned.
settings.calendarHoverActionStartTimerDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can start or resume tracking.
settings.contextualMenuActionStartTimerDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can start or resume tracking.
settings.calendarHoverActionMarkDoneDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can be marked as finished.
settings.contextualMenuActionMarkDoneDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can be marked as finished.
settings.contextualMenuActionCancelTaskDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task can be cancelled.
settings.calendarHoverActionUnscheduleDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can clear its schedule.
settings.contextualMenuActionUnscheduleDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can clear its schedule.
settings.calendarHoverActionJumpToSourceDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current block can jump to its source note.
settings.contextualMenuActionJumpToSourceDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current item can jump to its source note.
settings.calendarHoverActionSetAsTrackedDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when a past timed block can be logged as tracked time.
settings.contextualMenuActionSetAsTrackedDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when a past timed block can be logged as tracked time.
settings.contextualMenuActionSetAsTrackedCalendar: Log this planned time block as tracked time.
settings.calendarHoverActionClearDueDateDesc: Show this action in the calendar hover menu when the current task has a due date to clear.
settings.contextualMenuActionClearDueDateDesc: Show this action in the contextual menu when the current task has a due date to clear.
settings.calendarHoverActionSkipThisOccurrenceDes: Show this action in the calendar hover menu for projected recurring occurrences.
settings.contextualMenuActionSkipThisOccurrenceDe: Show this action in the contextual menu for projected recurring occurrences.
settings.externalCalendarsDesc: Add read-only ICS calendars that render inside the Operon calendar as timed or all-day events.
settings.externalCalendarsAddDesc: Create another read-only ICS calendar source with its own color and refresh interval.
settings.externalCalendarPresetVisibilityNote: External calendars are shown per calendar preset. Enable this source inside the calendar presets where you want it to appear.
settings.externalCalendarNameDesc: Shown in settings and stored with the source metadata.
settings.externalCalendarUrlDesc: Accepts https, webcal, or direct .ics links.
settings.externalCalendarHideCreatedEventsDesc: When enabled, this source hides external events that already have a matching task on the same scheduled date. When disabled, external events stay visible.
settings.externalCalendarColorDesc: Used as the event background color inside the Operon calendar.
settings.externalCalendarRefreshHoursDesc: Background sync cadence for this source. Rendering always uses cache immediately.
settings.deleteExternalCalendarMessage: This removes the external calendar source from settings and clears its visibility from calendar presets. Cached events for this source are removed after settings are saved.
settings.calendarSidebarCalendarsDefaultStateDesc: Choose whether the sidebar Calendars section starts expanded or collapsed when a calendar leaf opens.
settings.calendarSidebarTaskPoolDefaultStateDesc: Choose whether the sidebar Task Pool starts expanded or collapsed when a calendar leaf opens.
settings.calendarSidebarTaskPoolFollowPresetFilte: Limit the sidebar Task Pool to the active Calendar preset filter before applying Task Pool modes and search.
settings.calendarSidebarFinishedTasksDefaultState: Choose whether the sidebar Finished Tasks section starts expanded or collapsed when a calendar leaf opens.
settings.calendarSidebarTaskPoolLimitDesc: The sidebar task pool initially shows the {{initialLimit}} most recently updated tasks. Search scans the full list and shows up to {{searchLimit}} matches.
settings.trackerHistoryWindowDaysDesc: Number of recent calendar days shown in the tracker sidebar history. (1-365)
settings.trackerTaskDescriptionClickActionDesc: Choose what happens when you click a task description inside the Time Session History sidebar.
settings.trackerSplitSessionsAtMidnightDesc: When a tracker session crosses into a new day, store it as separate per-day tracker ranges for cleaner history and reporting.
settings.trackerShowStatusBarTimer: Show active timer in status bar
settings.trackerShowStatusBarTimerDesc: Show the tracker control in Obsidian's status bar. Displays a play button when idle and the active timer while tracking.
settings.flowTimePauseDurationDesc: Length of breaks taken in FlowTime.
settings.flowTimeUseLastSelectedDuration: Use last selected duration as FlowTime default
settings.flowTimeUseLastSelectedDurationDesc: Use the duration set from the FlowTime dial as the next default session length.
settings.flowTimeDefaultSessionMinutesDesc: Countdown length used when entering FlowTime (when 'use last selected duration' is off).
settings.flowTimeShowNumericTimerDesc: Show the numeric elapsed or remaining time in the TrackTime & FlowTime sidebar.
settings.flowTimeNotifyOnTargetReachedDesc: Show a small notice when the FlowTime countdown reaches zero.
settings.kanbanSettingsDesc: Configure swimlane-first kanban presets, default board selection, and shared column sizing.
settings.kanbanDefaultPresetDesc: New kanban leaves start with this preset unless the leaf already has its own saved state.
settings.kanbanExpandedColumnWidthDesc: Controls the width of expanded kanban columns across all presets.
settings.kanbanSwimlaneMaxHeightDesc: Maximum tasks visible per kanban swimlane cell before it becomes scrollable.
settings.kanbanShowHoverAddButton: Show hover add button in Kanban
settings.kanbanShowHoverAddButtonDesc: Show the centered add button when hovering empty space in a Kanban cell.
settings.kanbanTaskShowNotesPreview: Show notes preview on Kanban cards
settings.kanbanTaskShowNotesPreviewDesc: Shows a compact two-line note preview directly under the task description when a Kanban card has notes.
settings.kanbanTaskShowSubtaskProgress: Show subtask progress on Kanban cards
settings.kanbanTaskShowSubtaskProgressDesc: Shows a slim progress track between the task title and chips for descendant subtasks on Kanban cards.
settings.kanbanTaskShowPlainCheckboxProgress: Show checkbox progress on Kanban cards
settings.kanbanTaskShowPlainCheckboxProgressDesc: Shows a slim footer progress track for attached plain checkboxes on Kanban cards.
settings.kanbanMobileLayoutChromeDesc: Use phone and touch-first Kanban layout adjustments in narrow views.
settings.kanbanMobileLayoutMaxWidthDesc: Touch Kanban views at or below this width use mobile layout behavior.
settings.kanbanMobileSwimlaneHandleWidthDesc: Width of the compact colored swimlane rail on mobile.
settings.kanbanMobileSwimlaneRailAlwaysVisible: Always show Mobile Kanban swimlane rail
settings.kanbanMobileSwimlaneRailAlwaysVisibleDes: Keep the compact swimlane rail visible on mobile instead of showing it only after horizontal scrolling.
settings.kanbanMobileHorizontalStatusSnapDesc: When enabled, mobile horizontal scrolling settles on whole status columns and card drags near the side edges advance by column.
settings.kanbanPresetsDesc: Each preset controls the board pipeline, saved filter, swimlane grouping, sort order, color source, and appearance.
settings.tableSettingsDesc: Manage reusable Operon Table presets, default table selection, and table view configuration.
settings.tableDefaultPresetDesc: New Operon Table leaves start with this preset unless the leaf already has its own saved state.
settings.tableEmbedVisibleRows: Maximum visible rows in embedded tables
settings.tableEmbedVisibleRowsDesc: Sets the default height of embedded Operon Tables. Additional rows remain available by scrolling.
settings.tableShowLineNumbersDesc: Show a visible row-number column at the start of Operon Tables.
settings.tableShowTaskIconDesc: Show a Kanban-style task icon column with status cycling and the task context menu.
settings.tableShowTaskTypeIconDesc: Show a Type column with inline/file task icons that open Task Editor.
settings.tablePresetsDesc: Each preset controls the table scope, columns, sort rules, grouping, summaries, and display options.
settings.tableAtLeastOnePresetRequired: At least one table preset is required.
settings.deleteTablePresetMessage: This removes the table preset from Operon settings. Tasks and filters are not changed.
settings.kanbanAddPresetDesc: Create another reusable kanban board preset.
settings.kanbanAtLeastOnePresetRequired: At least one kanban preset is required.
settings.activeKanbanPresetMissing: The active kanban preset could not be found.
settings.kanbanPresetNameDesc: Shown in the kanban toolbar preset switcher.
settings.kanbanPresetNameRequired: Kanban preset name cannot be empty.
settings.kanbanQuickPresetNameDesc: Shown in the kanban view toolbar.
settings.kanbanPipelineDesc: Columns are generated from the selected pipeline statuses.
settings.kanbanSwimlaneFieldDesc: Rows are generated from values of this field.
settings.kanbanTaskColorSourceDesc: Choose which task color system kanban cards should follow.
settings.kanbanCollapseEmptyColumnsDesc: Automatically collapse pipeline columns that currently have no matching tasks.
settings.kanbanCollapseEmptySwimlanesDesc: Automatically collapse swimlanes with no visible matching tasks after auto-collapsed finished columns are ignored.
settings.kanbanAutoCollapseFinishedColumnsDesc: Automatically collapse pipeline columns marked as finished in this kanban preset. Improves performance on large boards.
settings.kanbanSortingDesc: Control how tasks are ordered inside kanban cells.
settings.kanbanManualOrderingDesc: Cards keep the order you set by dragging them inside each kanban cell.
settings.deleteKanbanPresetMessage: This removes the kanban preset from settings. If it is the current default, the first remaining preset becomes the new default.
settings.pipelinesDesc: Workflow statuses, colors, icons, and automatic status behavior.
settings.pipelinesPageDesc: Pipelines define the workflow stages your tasks move through. Each status can have its own color, icon, and automatic behavior. Choose the statuses Operon should switch tasks to when a date is assigned, time tracking starts, a task is finished, or a task is cancelled. Status values use the format Pipeline.Status, for example Project.InProgress.
settings.pipelineDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe when humans and agents should use this pipeline...
settings.priorityDesc: Define priority rank, order, colors, icons, and the default priority for new tasks. Priority order is used for sorting, views, and planning decisions.
settings.priorityDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe when humans and agents should use this priority...
settings.deletePriorityMessage: This removes the priority definition and color. Existing task priority values are not migrated or cleared automatically.
settings.defaultPriorityDesc: Automatically assigned when creating a new task. Leave empty for no default.
settings.deletePipelineMessage: This removes the pipeline definition and its matrix settings. Existing task status values are not migrated automatically.
settings.statusAlreadyExists: Status "{{name}}" already exists in this pipeline.
settings.scheduledTargetTerminalTooltip: Terminal statuses cannot be scheduled targets.
settings.scheduledTargetTooltip: Move tasks into this status when a scheduled date is assigned.
settings.trackingTargetTerminalTooltip: Terminal statuses cannot be tracking targets.
settings.trackingTargetTooltip: Move tasks into this status when tracking starts.
settings.finishedStatusAutomationTooltip: Scheduled or tracking targets cannot be finished statuses.
settings.finishedStatusTooltip: Mark this status as the pipeline finished state.
settings.cancelledStatusAutomationTooltip: Scheduled or tracking targets cannot be cancelled statuses.
settings.cancelledStatusTooltip: Mark this status as the pipeline cancelled state.
settings.deleteStatusMessage: This removes the status definition from the {{pipeline}} pipeline. Existing task status values are not migrated or cleared automatically.
settings.pipelineAtLeastOneStatus: A pipeline must have at least one status.
settings.pipelineRenameMigrationUnexpectedError: Rename migration encountered an unexpected error. Review affected task statuses.
settings.pipelineRenameMigrationMessage: This change will update {{fileTaskCount}} file tasks and {{inlineTaskCount}} inline tasks across {{touchedFileCount}} files. Continue?
settings.priorityRenameMigrationUnexpectedError: Priority rename migration encountered an unexpected error. Review affected task priorities.
settings.priorityRenameMigrationMessage: This change will update {{fileTaskCount}} file tasks and {{inlineTaskCount}} inline tasks across {{touchedFileCount}} files. Continue?
settings.taskCreatorDefaultToFileTask: Default to File Task in Task Creator
settings.taskCreatorDefaultToFileTaskDesc: When enabled, generic Task Creator opens with File Task selected instead of Inline Task.
settings.taskCreatorDefaultFileTemplateDesc: Choose the template preselected when Task Creator enters File Task mode. Leave empty to keep showing Pick a template.
settings.fileTaskTemplateFolderDesc: Top-level markdown files in this folder are listed in the template picker. The built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks is always available. Leave empty to show only the built-in template.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewNoFolder: No template folder selected. The picker will show only the built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewFolderMissing: Template folder not found. The picker will fall back to the built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewNoTemplates: No top-level markdown files found in the selected folder. The picker will still show the built-in Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewTemplates: Top-level templates: {{names}}. Default conversion template uses the first file alphabetically.
settings.fileTaskTemplatePreviewDefaultConversion: Default conversion template uses the first file alphabetically.
settings.excludedFoldersDesc: Tasks in these folders stay outside Operon's global index, views, and placeholder normalization. The template folder is excluded separately.
settings.excludedFileTasksFolderBlocked: {{folder}} is the File tasks folder or contains it, so it cannot be excluded.
settings.excludedFileTasksFolderRemoved: Removed the File tasks folder from excluded folders.
settings.createDailyNotesAsOperonTask: Create daily notes as an Operon task
settings.createDailyNotesAsOperonTaskDesc: When enabled, daily notes created by Operon are initialized with the Minimal File Template for Operon Tasks.
settings.fileTaskAutoArchiveEnabledDesc: When enabled, Operon moves finished or cancelled file tasks to the archive folder after the configured delay.
settings.fileTaskArchiveFolderDesc: Folder for archived file tasks. Default is Operon/Archives.
settings.fileTaskArchiveDelaySecondsDesc: Seconds to wait after a file task becomes finished or cancelled before moving it.
settings.fileTaskArchiveOnlyFromFileTasksFolder: Only archive tasks inside File tasks folder
settings.fileTaskArchiveOnlyFromFileTasksFolderDe: When enabled, Operon only archives file tasks currently inside the configured File tasks folder.
settings.fileTaskMigrationDesc: Convert existing notes into Operon File Tasks by matching a folder, tag, or frontmatter property rule. Excluded folders are always skipped.
settings.fileTaskMigrationResultSummary: {{total}} files match this selection. {{convertible}} can be converted. {{already}} already are Operon File Tasks. {{excluded}} are in excluded folders.
settings.fileTaskMigrationMissingRule: Choose a migration rule before scanning.
settings.fileTaskMigrationScanChanged: The scan result changed before conversion. Review the updated result and confirm again.
settings.fileTaskMigrationFilesChanged: One or more target files changed after the scan. Review the updated result and confirm again.
settings.fileTaskMigrationConfirmMessage: {{count}} existing notes will be converted into Operon File Tasks. Operon will add operonId and the mapped datetimeModified property while preserving existing frontmatter values.
settings.fileTaskMigrationCompleted: Converted {{converted}} files into Operon File Tasks.
settings.fileTaskMigrationCompletedWithFailures: Converted {{converted}} files. {{failed}} files could not be converted.

tooltips.convertTasksSyntaxToOperonTask: Convert Tasks syntax to Operon task
tooltips.searchTasksInKanbanBoard: Search tasks in this kanban board

errors.timerAlreadyRunning: Timer already running on another task

calendar.title: Operon Calendar
calendar.previousSpanTooltip: Move backward by the current visible day span.
calendar.nextSpanTooltip: Move forward by the current visible day span.
calendar.mobileCycleViewSingle: {{current}} view. Only one mobile view is enabled.
calendar.mobileNoItems: No calendar items in this range.
calendar.noSearchMatches: No tasks match the current search.
calendar.noOpenTasksForList: No open tasks are available for this list.
calendar.noFinishedTasksForDay: No finished tasks for this day.
calendar.noCalendarFilterMatches: No tasks match the current calendar filter.
calendar.noFilteredTasksVisible: No filtered tasks are visible in the current calendar range.
calendar.calendarViewSettingsHelp: Only filter matching is applied here. Filter grouping and sorting do not affect calendar layout.
calendar.filterPickerNoFilterDesc: Show all tasks in this calendar view.
calendar.activeCalendarPresetMissing: The active calendar preset could not be found.
calendar.calendarPresetQuickHelp: Quick access to the active calendar preset settings.
calendar.presetNameDesc: Shown in the calendar view preset switcher.
calendar.presetNameRequired: Calendar preset name cannot be empty.
calendar.calendarPresetTypeDesc: Choose whether this preset uses the classic time grid, the time tracker grid, or the multi-week block layout.
calendar.weekCountDesc: Choose how many consecutive weeks this preset displays.
calendar.focusedWeekNumberDesc: When you choose a day, place it at this week's position in the multi-week view.
calendar.visibleDayCountDesc: How many consecutive days this preset displays.
calendar.todayPositionDesc: Choose which visible column should hold the anchor day when opening or recentering this preset.
calendar.slotMinutesDesc: Base slot size for the timed grid in this preset.
calendar.hiddenTimeDesc: Choose one 15-minute interval to collapse in the timed grid for this preset.
calendar.taskColorSourceDesc: Choose whether calendar blocks use task color, workflow status color, priority color, or no color.
calendar.appearanceLightDesc: Color scheme used when Obsidian is in light mode.
calendar.appearanceDarkDesc: Color scheme used when Obsidian is in dark mode.
calendar.showWeekendsDesc: Keep Saturdays and Sundays visible when counting calendar days.
calendar.showFutureOccurrencesDesc: Show projected future instances for recurring tasks in this preset.
calendar.showExternalCalendarsDesc: Show external calendar sources selected for this preset.
calendar.noExternalCalendarsSelectedForPreset: No external calendars selected for this preset
calendar.rescheduleReplaceMessage: This task already has calendar fields. Replace the existing plan with the new slot?
calendar.rescheduleOverwriteMessage: This task already has scheduling data. Replacing it will overwrite the current calendar plan.
calendar.materializationUnsupportedConditions: Filter conditions that cannot be applied automatically
calendar.materializationPureAllOnly: Only conditions inside pure "all" groups can be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationUnsafeField: This filter field is not safe to write automatically from the calendar.
calendar.materializationMissingValue: The filter condition has no explicit value to apply.
calendar.materializationConflictingExactReason: Conflicting exact filter requirements for the same field cannot be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationExactOrAdditiveOnly: Only exact-set text or number conditions and additive list or tag requirements can be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationUnsupportedLogic: Conditions inside "{{logic}}" groups cannot be applied automatically.
calendar.materializationAllAreReason: Automatic calendar updates can add missing values, but they do not remove existing list items required by the 'all of' rule.
calendar.calendarSettingsDesc: Configure Calendar presets, default calendar navigation, time grid behavior, all-day and due lanes, sidebar sections, and external calendar visibility.
calendar.defaultPresetDesc: New calendar leaves start with this preset unless the leaf already has its own saved state.
calendar.weekStartDesc: Controls week labels and future calendar navigation defaults.
calendar.showWeekLabelOnFirstDay: Show week label on first day
calendar.showWeekLabelOnFirstDayDesc: Show a large Wxx label inside the first day of each week in calendar headers.
calendar.showHoverAddButton: Show hover add button in Calendar
calendar.showHoverAddButtonDesc: Show the add button when hovering all-day Calendar date cells.
calendar.dayTitleActionDesc: Choose what happens when you click or tap a day title in calendar headers.
calendar.inlineTaskHeadingDesc: Markdown heading used as the insertion target for calendar inline tasks. If empty, the default placeholder heading is used.
calendar.initialScrollModeDesc: Choose whether new calendar leaves open at a fixed hour or automatically around the current local time.
calendar.currentTimePositionDesc: Used by auto scroll mode. Controls how much of the visible range stays above versus below the current time.
calendar.defaultScrollHourDesc: Used only when the initial scroll mode is set to Fixed hour.
calendar.timeGridScaleDesc: Scales the vertical hour spacing in timed calendar views.
calendar.touchTimeGridTaskMoveDesc: Allow phone, tablet, and pen users to long-press existing time-grid tasks and move them.
calendar.touchDragLongPressDesc: How long a touch or pen press must stay on a timed task before move drag starts.
calendar.touchDragCancelDistanceDesc: How far the pointer can drift before the pending long-press drag is cancelled.
calendar.viewPresetsDesc: Each preset controls the visible day span, timed grid density, and overall calendar layout.
calendar.addPresetDesc: Create another reusable calendar layout such as 3-day focus or 14-day planning.
calendar.showAllDayLaneDesc: Display scheduled all-day blocks above the timed grid in all calendar presets.
calendar.showDueLaneDesc: Display due-date markers in a dedicated lane above the timed grid in all calendar presets.
calendar.sidebarWidthDesc: Controls the width of the calendar sidebar in pixels. You can also drag the sidebar edge directly in sidebar mode.
calendar.showWeekNumbersDesc: Show a week-number column in the sidebar mini month.
calendar.atLeastOneCalendarPresetRequired: At least one calendar preset is required.
calendar.deleteCalendarPresetMessage: This removes the calendar preset from settings. If it is the current default, the first remaining preset becomes the new default.
calendar.presetSummaryTimeTrackerGrid: {{count}} day view · time tracker grid · {{minutes}}min slots

location.noPlaces: No place notes with valid coordinates were found.
location.mapHint: Right-click the map to copy coordinates, then paste here or use the clipboard button. Places use {{property}}.
location.invalidCoordinates: Enter valid coordinates as lat, lng.
location.clipboardInvalid: Clipboard does not contain valid coordinates.
location.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard read is unavailable. Paste the coordinates manually.
location.mapsPluginUnavailable: Maps is unavailable. Use Places or Manual instead.

taskEditor.removeInlineTaskMessage: This removes the inline task. The line will remain empty. Continue?
taskEditor.removeFileTaskMessage: This moves the file task to Obsidian trash. Continue?
taskEditor.dependencyBlockedMessage: This task has unresolved predecessor tasks. Resolve or remove the active dependency before changing its workflow status.
taskEditor.dependencyRejectedCycleMessage: This dependency would create a cycle: {{cycle}}.
taskEditor.datetimeEndRequiresStart: Set a start time before choosing an end time.
taskEditor.datetimeOffGridTimeNotice: Existing time will be preserved until you change it.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationTooltip: Subtract this estimate delta from the parent chain to keep the same total estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationPartialTooltip: Part of this estimate delta can be subtracted from the parent chain.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationNeedsIncrease: Increase the estimate above its saved value to subtract the delta from the parent.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationNoBudget: No available estimate budget was found in the parent chain.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationNoParent: This task has no direct parent.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationConfirmMessage: This will subtract the full estimate delta from the parent chain while keeping the child's new estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationPartialConfirmMessag: Only part of the estimate delta can be subtracted from the parent chain. The remaining uncovered delta will increase the total estimate.
taskEditor.estimateReallocationUnavailable: Parent estimate changed while this dialog was open. Try again.
taskEditor.webLinkRequired: Use an http or https link.
taskEditor.terminalDateConflict: Only one terminal date can be set at a time.
taskEditor.terminalDateWorkflowResolveFailed: Unable to resolve workflow status for the selected terminal date.
taskEditor.repeatAddHint: Use the picker to define schedule-based or completion-based recurrence.
taskEditor.repeatUnsupportedWarning: This repeat value is not supported by the picker yet.
taskEditor.repeatSkipUnavailable: Skipping future occurrences works only for saved schedule- or count-based repeats with a fixed scheduled date.
taskEditor.repeatSkipNoProjectedDates: No projected occurrences in this month.
taskEditor.repeatSkipModeDoneHint: Future skip is unavailable for completion-based recurrence.
taskEditor.repeatCompletedCopyReplaceTooltip: Completed inline task is replaced with the next occurrence.
taskEditor.repeatCompletedCopyInlineOnlyTooltip: Only available for inline recurring tasks.
taskEditor.repeatScopeThisTaskDesc: Apply the temporal change only to this occurrence.
taskEditor.repeatScopeThisAndFollowingDesc: Apply the temporal change from this occurrence forward.
taskEditor.repeatScopeSkipThisTaskDesc: Skip this occurrence without editing older occurrences.
taskEditor.parentTaskClearFirst: Clear the current parent task before choosing another one.
taskEditor.parentTaskPlaceholder: Search by operonId or task text
taskEditor.subtasksPlaceholder: Search by operonId or task text
taskEditor.subtasksSaveFirst: Save task first to add subtasks
taskEditor.invalidSessionRange: End time must be later than start time.
taskEditor.activeTrackerReadOnly: Active timer for {{task}}. Stop it before editing.
taskEditor.unassignedTrackerReadOnly: Active unassigned timer. Assign it before editing.
taskEditor.chooseInlineTaskTargetFile: Choose an inline task target file...
taskEditor.chooseRepeatingFileTaskSeries: Choose a recurring file task series...
taskEditor.noMatchingRepeatingFileTaskSeries: No matching recurring file task series
taskEditor.renameMigrationIntro: Updating task statuses. This window stays locked until the migration finishes.
taskEditor.renameMigrationStopped: The rename migration stopped early. Review the status below, then close this window.
taskEditor.renameMigrationFinishedIntro: Rename migration finished. Review the counts below, then press OK or click outside to close.
taskEditor.priorityRenameMigrationIntro: Updating task priorities. This window stays locked until the migration finishes.
taskEditor.priorityRenameMigrationStopped: The priority rename migration stopped early. Review the status below, then close this window.
taskEditor.priorityRenameMigrationFinishedIntro: Priority rename migration finished. Review the counts below, then press OK or click outside to close.

filterSets.tabDesc: Define named filter sets to query tasks in the Filter View. Each set can have multiple conditions, match logic, and optional sorting.
filterSets.userFiltersDesc: Create and order saved filters for Filter View and embedded filter blocks. Each filter can combine conditions, match logic, sorting, and reusable query rules.
filterSets.dynamicFileTaskFilterDesc: Automatic file-task filter for YAML file task notes.
filterSets.dynamicSubtasksFilterDesc: Context-menu subtask tree filter for the selected task.
filterSets.taskCardSettingsDesc: These options affect task cards in Filter View, embedded filters, and filter previews.
filterSets.empty: No filter sets defined. Use the button below to add one.
filterSets.presetFilterCreateTooltip: Create a saved filter. Saved filters update globally immediately, even if this preset dialog is canceled.
filterSets.presetFilterEditTooltip: Edit the selected saved filter globally. Changes apply immediately everywhere this filter is used.
filterSets.presetFilterPickTooltip: Choose an existing filter for this preset.
filterSets.presetFilterClearTooltip: Remove the filter from this preset draft.
filterSets.noFilterSets: No filters defined. Go to Settings → Filters to create one.
filterSets.dynamicFileTaskFilterLockedConditionDesc: This condition is dynamic and cannot be edited: operonId is the current file task's operonId.
filterSets.dynamicSubtasksFilterLockedConditionDesc: This condition is dynamic and cannot be edited: operonId is the selected parent task's operonId.
filterSets.usedByNone: Not used by calendar, kanban, or table presets.
filterSets.deleteFilterMessage: Delete filter "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

table.title: Operon Table
table.editCellAria: Click, press Enter, Space, or F2 to edit.
table.relatedViewsMenuLabelWithFilter: Open related views with this filter
table.relatedViewsEmpty: No related views use this filter.
table.relatedViewsOpenFailed: Related view could not be opened.
table.relatedViewsCreateFailed: Related view could not be created.
table.searchEmptyDescription: No tasks match this search in the current table scope.
table.searchScopeUnavailable: This search scope is not available in Operon Table yet.
table.activePresetMissing: The active table preset is missing.
table.presetScopeDesc: Choose the FilterSet that defines which tasks appear in this table.
table.groupByDesc: Choose one field to group table rows.
table.subgroupByDesc: Choose one field to subgroup table rows.
table.parentSearchMoreResults: {{count}} more results. Keep typing to narrow.
table.embedInvalidSyntax: Invalid table embed syntax. Use presetId: "table-preset-id".
